headline: Micron Rises 7%, Western Digital Climbs and SanDisk Climb 4% as Memory Stocks Extend Parabolic Run
summary: Memory and storage stocks are catching another strong bid at midday Monday as the AI memory supercycle extends one of the most extraordinary runs in semiconductors. Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) stock is up 7% to around $1,041, Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) stock is gaining 4% to $554, and SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) stock is adding 4% to around $1,758 ... Micron Rises 7%, Western Digital Climbs and SanDisk Climb 4% as Memory Stocks Extend Parabolic Run

headline: Jim Cramer on Micron: “Unlike the Dot-Coms, It’s Insanely Profitable”
summary: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) was one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money as he explained that many investors might be missing out on the market’s biggest winners. Cramer discussed the “bubble” concerns around the stock and its peers, as he said: I think it’s an insult to group this market’s winners […]

headline: SanDisk Stock Near $1,700: Two Risks That Could Break the Momentum
summary: When a stock goes vertical, climbing 167% in three months and a staggering 669% in six, it is easy to assume the move is driven by pure momentum. But if you look closely at SanDisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) as it hovers near $1,700, the reality is far more calculated than a typical trend. While institutional allocators have spent weeks confirming management's latest guidance raise, buying at these levels requires balancing that fundamental execution against two looming structural traps. The strategic wager

headline: WD at Computex 2026: AI Doesn't Just Run on Compute - It Runs on Data
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif. & TAIPEI, Taiwan, June 01, 2026--Western Digital Corporation (Nasdaq: WDC), the storage foundation of the AI-driven data economy, today announced its presence at Computex 2026 to help the industry understand that AI infrastructure is fundamentally a data system, not just a compute system. Every AI workload - from training and inference to agentic and physical AI – continuously creates data that persists, compounds, and expands over time. This dynamic is fundamentally changing ho

headline: Is Western Digital (WDC) One of the Best Future Tech Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires?
summary: Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is one of the best future tech stocks to buy according to billionaires. On May 26, Western Digital Corporation appointed Manuvir Das to its board of directors. A veteran technology executive, Das currently serves as an Operating Partner at Stonepeak Partners LP and brings extensive experience in enterprise AI, cloud computing, […]
